datasync.locationhdfs.namenode.Hostname.Docs: The hostname of the NameNode in the HDFS cluster. This value is the IP address or Domain Name Service (DNS) name of the NameNode. An agent that's installed on-premises uses this hostname to communicate with the NameNode in the network.

datasync.locationhdfs.namenode.Port.Docs: The port that the NameNode uses to listen to client requests.
